popup.content:
Canada's Wonderland, ON

Canada's Wonderland is the largest and most visited amusement park in Canada. As of 2025, it operates over 200 attractions, 60 thrill rides and 18 roller coasters. 3,800,000 thrill seekers visit every year. Will you be one of them?

You can visit here by using /warp Canada'sWonderlandClick to copy me on the server.

Vancouver, BC

Vancouver is the largest city in British Columbia. A bustling metroplis, it has hosted many international events such as the Olympics, TedX talks and green peace. Additionally, it is also a popular filming location for movie studios.

You can visit here by using /warp Vancouver_BCClick to copy me on the server.

Charlottetown, PEI

Charlottetown is the capital of Prince Edward Island. Known for it's large potato production, it grows 25% of all Canadian potatoes despite the small size of the province. Confederation bridge, the worlds longest bridge to cross ice covered water, connects the island to the mainland. Within Charlottetown sits Province House, where the Canadian confederation was first discussed.

You can visit here by using /warp CharlottetownClick to copy me on the server.

Whitehorse, YT

Whitehorse is the capital of Yukon and title holder of the least air polluted city in the world. The city sits at kilometer 1,425 of the Alaska Highway. Historically, it experienced a gold rush in the nearby Klondike region between 1896 and 1899. Buildings are often constructed from or around old military lodgings and neighborhoods are often separated by major geological features due to the varied topography.

You can visit here by using /warp WhitehorseClick to copy me on the server.

Yellowknife, NWT

Yellowknife is the capital and only city of the Northwest Territories. Nowadays, it is mainly known for its diamond mining industry and arctic tourism. Attractions include the Gold Range Bar (one of Canada's oldest drinking establishments) and one of the oldest Hudson's Bay Warehouses, which supplied materials to northern gold prospectors.

You can visit here by using /warp YellowknifeClick to copy me on the server.

Cenotaph

Regina, SK

Regina is the capital of Saskatchewan. A major exporter of potash and wheat, it is surrounded by generational farmland. Attractions include the Royal Saskatchewan Museum, Hotel Saskatchewan and the RCMP's national training centre.

You can visit here by using /warp ReginaClick to copy me on the server.

Regina Airport

Calgary, AB

Calgary is the largest city in Alberta. Ranked as the third most livable city in the world in 2022 it contains the most extensive walking and cycling pathway network in North America. Here you can find the Telus Convention Centre, Calgary Tower and, Canada's Olympic and Sports Hall's of Fame.

You can visit here by using /warp CalgaryClick to copy me on the server.

Sunlit Downtown

Legislative Assembly

Victoria, BC

Victoria is the capital of British Columbia. Nicknamed the Garden City, it is famous for the Butchart Gardens, Fairmont Empress hotel and its beautiful coastline. It also contains the oldest China Town in Canada.

You can visit here by using /warp VictoriaClick to copy me on the server.

Empress Hotel

Wilmot United Church

Fredericton, NB

Fredericton is the capital of New Brunswick. Home of the Harvest Jazz and Blues Festival, the city is steeped in Victorian architecture. You can also find “Freddy the Nude Dude”, a historic statue, outside of city hall.

You can visit here by using /warp FrederictonClick to copy me on the server.

Québec City, QC

Québec City is the capital of Québec. (suprised pikachu face) As the only fortified city in Canada, it contains many medieval remnants. Castle walls, cannons and palaces are common sights in the older parts of the city.

You can visit here by using /warp Québec_QCClick to copy me on the server.

Iqaluit, NU

Iqaluit is the capital and only city in Nunavut. It is the northermost city in Canada and enjoys Aurora Borealis year round. Mostly inhabited by Inuits, many buildings incorporate Inuit art designs. St. Jude's Anglican Cathedral is shaped like an igloo, its altar shaped like a sled and the cross is composed of two crossed narwhal tusks.

You can visit here by using /warp IqaluitClick to copy me on the server.

City Hall

Halifax, NS

Halifax is the capital and most populated city of Nova Scotia. It is crested by the Halifax Citadel and known for it's deep non freezing harbour. The Mi'kmaq called the harbour Kjipuktuk (Chebucto) meaning The Great Harbour.

You can visit here by using /warp HalifaxClick to copy me on the server.

The Citadel

Winnipeg, MB

Winnipeg is the capital of Manitoba. It contains 26 National Historic Sites within its borders. Structures of interest include the Canadian Museum for Human Rights and The Royal Canadian Mint which produces all of Canada's coinage.

You can visit here by using /warp Winnipeg_MBClick to copy me on the server.

Edmonton, AB

Edmonton is the capital of Alberta. Nicknamed the oil capital of Canada, it is our largest fossil fuel export hub. Here you will find North America's largest mall (the world's largest from 1981 to 2004) and the Rogers Place Arena.

You can visit here by using /warp EdmontonClick to copy me on the server.

Royal Alberta Museum

Niagara Falls, ON

Niagara Falls is composed of three waterfalls on the border of Ontario and New York. These falls have the highest flow rate of any waterfall in North America. They are also known for the terrifying practice of barrel jumping, tumbling over the falls while inside a barrel, with mixed results.

You can visit here by using /warp Niagara_FallsClick to copy meClick to copy me on the server.

Trial Area

Where every potential builder begins, the Trial Area is a practice grounds for those interested in becoming a builder. Here, you will build your first house by following the provided tutorial. Visit the #Become-a-Builder channel in the discord to find more information.

You can visit here by using /trialClick to copy me on the server.

Parliament

Ottawa, ON

Ottawa is the capital city of Canada, located in Ontario at the confluence of the Ottawa and Rideau Rivers. It is known for its rich history, bilingual culture, and significant government buildings, including Parliament Hill and various national museums.

You can visit here by using /warp OttawaClick to copy me on the server.

National War Memorial

St John's, NL

St John's is the capital of Newfoundland and Labrador. Sitting on the easternmost point of Canada, it was a common landing spot for ships traversing the ocean. This led to a tumultuous history as nations waged war to claim it. Downtown is mainly composed of historic fishermen homes, sheds and storage turned into housing. It earned the name Jelly Bean Row for its colorful tightly packed homes.

You can visit here by using /warp StJohnsClick to copy me on the server.

Montréal, QC

Montréal is the largest city in Québec, Canada, known for its rich history, vibrant culture, and diverse population. It features a unique blend of European and North American influences, with attractions like Old Montréal, Mount Royal, and a lively arts scene

You can visit here by using /warp MontréalClick to copy me on the server.

Toronto, ON

Toronto is the capital of Ontario. A vibrant city, it features prominent music, theatre and television productions. Additinally, it is the site of the tallest freestanding structure in North America, the CN Tower.

You can visit here by using /warp TorontoClick to copy me on the server.
